llmResponse.agenda_changes: No changes to agenda announced. Item 4.2 (Report Out on Closed Session) was addressed before the formal approval of the agenda, but this appears to be a procedural matter related to the closed session that had just concluded rather than a formal agenda change.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Is there a motion to approve the consent? Second giving Dennis and Maria was a second. Can we have a roll call vote, please?
